_source: benchmark_frank_tests — accidental vocabulary elicitation across 80-model test suite
_purpose: Maps natural model vocabulary to actual Alfred/FieldBench tool names. Use to build MCP tool description aliases, semantic tool router, or Qdrant tool resolution index. Each intent cluster shows what vocabulary different model families reach for when asked to perform that operation.
_usage: intents[intent_name]["by_model"][model_name]["terms"] = model-specific aliases. intents[intent_name]["top_consensus_terms"] = cross-model consensus vocabulary. intents[intent_name]["your_name"] = the actual Alfred/bridge tool name.

terms: safe retry with jitter and breaker
safe retry with jitter and breaker patterns
